# Stadium Guardian AI

A real-time stadium safety and fan experience platform.

## Fan Portal
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan - AI concierge, navigation, food ordering, emergency alerts
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/alerts - Live safety broadcasts
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/chat - Multilingual AI assistant
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/navigation - Stadium directions
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/food - Food and drink ordering
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/emergency - One-tap medical, fire, security
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/fan/ticket - Digital ticket lookup

## Staff Console
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff - Command center dashboard
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/incidents - Incident management
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/orders - Food order tracking
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/heatmap - Live crowd density heatmap
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/queue - Fan help queue
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/broadcast - Emergency broadcast system
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/fire - Fire safety controls
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/security - Security operations
- https://stadiumvault-007.web.app/staff/translate - Real-time translation
